query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: Warm-toned abstract image dominated by flowing fields of orange, amber, and peach. Soft radiating bands of light emanate from an upper central source, with brighter yellow-white concentrations in the lower right. Curved luminous streaks sweep across the frame, creating organic flowing patterns without discernible objects or figures.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Warm-toned abstract image dominated by flowing fields of orange, amber, and peach, rendered entirely through deliberate motion blur that dissolves all form into streaking light. Soft radiating bands emanate from an upper central source with brighter yellow-white concentrations in the lower right, while curved luminous streaks sweep across the frame. The extreme intentional softening eliminates all representational clarity, leaving only color, gesture, and atmospheric warmth as formal qualities without any discernible subject.
